data.content:
martinbaud

Software craftsman · Paris
Building AeryFlux — explore the world through music, news, and data on an interactive 3D globe.


---

### AeryFlux — Open Source | Package | | |---------|--| | [@aeryflux/globe](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aeryflux/globe) | 3D globe React/RN · [demo](https://aeryflux.github.io/globe-demo) | | [@aeryflux/xenova-bridge](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aeryflux/xenova-bridge) | NLP intent detection | | [geojsonto3D](https://github.com/martinbaud/geojsonto3D) | GeoJSON to 3D models | | [Lumos](https://aeryflux.com) · [Haki](https://haki.aeryflux.com) · [Atlas](https://atlas.aeryflux.com) | Apps | TypeScript · Three.js · React Native · Expo · Python ### AerySandBox — Game Servers | Project | | |---------|--| | [aof6_server](https://github.com/martinbaud/aof6_server) | Minecraft AOF6 | | [palworld-server](https://github.com/martinbaud/palworld-server-docker) | Palworld (Hetzner) | | [EnhancedSC](https://github.com/martinbaud/EnhancedSC) | Splinter Cell coop mod | Docker · Railway · Hetzner · Discord.js
### Tools [voicemode](https://github.com/martinbaud/voicemode) · [powershell-profile](https://github.com/martinbaud/powershell-profile) · [dynamic-readme](https://github.com/martinbaud/dynamic-readme) ### Links [Portfolio](https://martinbaud.github.io) · [Portal](https://martinbaud.github.io/aery-portal)
